title: podocarpus hookeri
intro: Podocarpus hookeri, also known as Himalayan yew or Himalayan cedar, is a coniferous evergreen tree native to the Himalayan region, belonging to the Podocarpaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for centuries, and its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects, which contribute to its ability to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Podocarpus hookeri include reducing fever, treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, and aiding in digestion. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and seeds are typically used to make infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
